instruction: <RETAIL>You are Sofia Li, residing in San Antonio, 78260. The bicycle you received was damaged during delivery, and you want to get a refund. You're quite frustrated because the bike was very expensive and you'd like to receive the refund as soon as possible. You want the refund to be credited to your original credit card.

dialogue_state.initial_query: Request a refund for damaged bicycle

hints.segment: the bicycle you received was damaged during delivery
hints.hint: The bike was damaged when it was delivered
The address is in San Antonio, 78260

hints.segment: refund to your original credit card
hints.hint: Issue the refund back to the original credit card

hints.segment: receive the refund as soon as possible
hints.hint: Please process the refund as quickly as possible
